last_assistant_message:
Commit successful. Here is a summary:

---

**Status:** Complete. 67 files changed, commit `fac2426a` on branch `rebrand`.

**What was found and fixed:**

Source code (functional changes):
- `packages/coding-agent/src/bun/cli.ts` — `process.title = "pi"` → `"dg-claw"`
- `packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/loader.ts` — `pkg.pi` manifest field read → `pkg["dg-claw"]`; `.pi/extensions/` path → `.dg-claw/extensions/`; comments
- `packages/coding-agent/src/core/package-manager.ts` — `pkg.pi` manifest reads (2 locations) → `pkg["dg-claw"]`; `SkillDiscoveryMode = "pi"` → `"dg-claw"` throughout
- `packages/coding-agent/src/core/sdk.ts`, `session-manager.ts`, `skills.ts` — JSDoc `~/.pi/agent` → `~/.dg-claw/agent`
- `packages/coding-agent/src/cli/args.ts` — `PI_OFFLINE`, `PI_SHARE_VIEWER_URL`, `PI_PACKAGE_DIR`, `PI_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION` help text → `DG_CLAW_*`
- `packages/coding-agent/src/config.ts` — comments updated
- `packages/coding-agent/src/main.ts` — `PI_OFFLINE` / `PI_SKIP_VERSION_CHECK` env reads → `DG_CLAW_*`; `.pi/settings.json` CLI help text
- `packages/coding-agent/src/migrations.ts` — `~/.pi/agent` path comments; GitHub URLs to forsonny/DG-Claw
- `packages/coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/interactive-mode.ts` — `PI_OFFLINE`, `PI_SKIP_VERSION_CHECK` → `DG_CLAW_*`; temp file path
- `packages/coding-agent/src/utils/tools-manager.ts` — `PI_OFFLINE` → `DG_CLAW_OFFLINE`
- `packages/tui/src/tui.ts` — `PI_DEBUG_REDRAW` → `DG_CLAW_DEBUG_REDRAW`; debug log path
- `packages/ai/src/providers/google-gemini-cli.ts` — `PI_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION` → `DG_CLAW_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION`
- `tsconfig.json` — all `@mariozechner/pi-*` path aliases → `@dg-claw/*`
- `scripts/browser-smoke-entry.ts`, `scripts/session-transcripts.ts` — updated imports and CLI spawn

Tests:
- `packages/ai/test/openai-codex-stream.test.ts` — `PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR` → `DG_CLAW_CODING_AGENT_DIR`
- `packages/coding-agent/test/rpc.test.ts` — env var and temp dir prefix
- `packages/coding-agent/test/package-manager.test.ts` — `PI_OFFLINE` → `DG_CLAW_OFFLINE`
- `packages/ai/test/tool-call-id-normalization.test.ts` — GitHub URL in comment

Examples and docs: All `@mariozechner/pi-*` package references, `"pi"` manifest field in example `package.json` files, `.pi/` paths, `badlogic/pi-mono` URLs, CLI spawn commands, and prose references updated across 30+ markdown and TypeScript example files.

Theme JSON files: `$schema` URLs updated to `forsonny/DG-Claw`.

**Left unchanged (intentional):**
- `originator: "pi"`, `User-Agent: "pi"` headers in `openai-codex-responses.ts` — wire protocol values sent to OpenAI Codex API
- `requestId: "pi-..."` prefix in `google-gemini-cli.ts` — upstream API identifier
- Test assertion `expect(headers.get("originator")).toBe("pi")` — correctly tests the upstream protocol value
- CHANGELOG files — historical upstream issue/PR references
- `overlay-qa-tests.ts:476,482` — hardcoded third-party developer machine path used as test fixture simulation
- Root `README.md` lines 5 and 32 — accurate fork lineage documentation
